title: neoleretia pittosporoides
intro: Neoleretia pittosporoides, a flowering plant species, is native to the Himalayan region and belongs to the family Loganiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as relief from respiratory problems and improved immune function. Neoleretia pittosporoides is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use.
